experiment: grounded vs ungrounded Haiku adversarial review, 20 partitions of caliper, Opus delta-adjudication

real_suppressed_findings.P05-6: load_merged_config drops PluginConfig.semgrep sub-config on package merge -> extra_config_dirs/exclude_rules lost
real_suppressed_findings.P10-1: subprocess_runner does not catch UnicodeDecodeError (text=True on binary) -> propagates, breaks fail-open
real_suppressed_findings.P10-2: get_version() unguarded importlib.metadata.version("caliper") at import -> PackageNotFoundError crashes renderer import
real_suppressed_findings.P10-3: subprocess_runner catches only FileNotFoundError, not other OSError (PermissionError) -> propagates
real_suppressed_findings.P11-2: DetectorFinding.to_finding() drops line_number/column (Finding model lacks them) -> SARIF/PR location lost
real_suppressed_findings.P12-1: secret_str only visits ast.AnnAssign; bare api_key="secret" (ast.Assign) never flagged -> false negative
real_suppressed_findings.P12-7: sql_injection flags .format with no args ("...?".format()) -> false positive on safe query
real_suppressed_findings.P12-8: sql_injection flags any ast.JoinedStr incl. constant f"SELECT" (no FormattedValue) -> false positive
real_suppressed_findings.P13-10: cache_eviction treats @lru_cache(maxsize=None) (unbounded) as bounded -> false negative
real_suppressed_findings.P13-4: transaction_rollback _is_looped_insert attributes execute to ANY loop in func, not enclosing one -> wrong scoping
real_suppressed_findings.P14-1: config_merge _is_dangerous_merge over-broad (same defect as grounded P14-1)
real_suppressed_findings.P14-2: docker_pin_drift regex pip\s+install\b unanchored at "pip" -> "mypip install x==1" false positive
real_suppressed_findings.P17-2: complexity.py run() passes no timeout to runner -> config scanner_timeout ignored, runner hardcoded 60 used
real_suppressed_findings.P17-3: cpd.py run() passes no timeout to runner -> config timeout never propagates
real_suppressed_findings.P20-1: webhook config.py WebhookSettings.secret required no default; _load_app() unguarded -> ValidationError startup crash
real_suppressed_findings.P20-2: webhook server enumerates via Path.rglob() directly, bypassing FileSourcePort seam (CLAUDE.md violation)

real_new_bug_findings.P01-1: evaluate_sbom() never sets commit_sha on ReviewRequests -> None into audit/parquet (evaluate() does)
real_new_bug_findings.P03-2: OpaRegoAdapter never populates triggered_rules; OpaEvaluator does -> user sees no rules on adapter path
real_new_bug_findings.P03-3: pipeline PolicyDecision->PolicyEvaluation drops warn_reasons/constraints -> approve_with_constraints renders empty
real_new_bug_findings.P08-3: concern_prompt except omits ValueError/JSONDecodeError from resp.json() -> uncaught, breaks fail-open
real_new_bug_findings.P11-1: get_annotation_text ', '.join(elements) crashes (TypeError) when a recursive call returns None (ast.Starred)
real_new_bug_findings.P11-6: is_applicable fnmatch on file.name only -> docstring 'config/*.yaml' patterns can never match
real_new_bug_findings.P13-3: circuit_breaker "half" in keyword.arg.lower() with no None guard -> AttributeError on **kwargs (swallowed)
real_new_bug_findings.P14-1: _is_dangerous_merge returns True for ANY {**a,**b} dict; config-key check is dead -> over-broad false positives
real_new_bug_findings.P15-2: graph_builder _walk_upstream .fetchone()["id"] unguarded -> TypeError crash when symbol missing/stale
real_new_bug_findings.P16-4: osv _resolve_severity uses assignment not max() -> CVSS 5.0 downgrades a database_specific "high" to "medium"
real_new_bug_findings.P16-5: gitleaks crash-detect requires exit!=0/1 AND missing report -> partial report on crash silently parsed as clean
real_new_bug_findings.P20-1: webhook _load_app CaliperSettings() with required db_dsn no default -> ValidationError crash before fail-open bootstrap

matched_both.claim: Type annotation does not match runtime tuple structure; category field is enum, not str
OpaRegoAdapter ignores the OPA decision field and can return incorrect verdicts when deny
load_merged_config silently drops telemetry field from root config when merging with packa
Popen timeout check uses global tree walk, missing assignment context — will flag even unr
Symlink escape check uses is_relative_to after resolve(), but the condition logic is confu
`_walk_upstream()` crashes when a queried symbol is not found in the database.
File scan counts are inflated when PMD crashes mid-run and jscpd fallback is triggered.
TimeoutExpired exception handler passes hardcoded timeout=0 instead of the actual timeout
TimeoutExpired exception handler passes hardcoded timeout=0 instead of the actual timeout
TimeoutExpired exception handler passes hardcoded timeout=0 instead of the actual timeout
Timeout value duplicated across subprocess.run() call and error message
Timeout value hardcoded to 0 instead of 30
manifest_changed is computed inside a loop but checked outside it, causing the final itera
